articles.title: Nearly 50 people die of thirst in Sahara desert after lorry breaks down
articles.description: Only two survived after trekking more than 50km (30 miles) across the desert to alert the authorities.

articles.title: How to Spot Greenwashing Claims When You Travel
articles.description: Hotels and other service providers pitch themselves as eco-friendly when they’re not. Here’s how to call their bluff.

articles.title: 13 Environmentally Conscious Packing Tips for Your Next Vacation
articles.description: Your trip starts impacting the planet before you even leave home. Here are a few pointers for keeping your footprint small.

articles.title: This Summer Travel Season Could Forever Alter the Future of Sustainable Aviation Fuel
articles.description: As the conflict in Iran disrupts the world’s oil supply, airlines are looking for jet fuel alternatives. The answer: energy from used cooking oil and french fry grease.

articles.title: How a Citizen Science Organization Aims to Preserve the Places It Brings Tourists to Study
articles.description: The actual eco-friendliness of ecotourism varies considerably. One research station in the Peruvian Amazon is out to prove it can bring visitors to the area without disrupting the environment.

articles.title: So Long, ‘Ferrynoia.’ Green Maritime Technology Is Here
articles.description: From San Francisco to Stockholm, a new generation of electric ferries is entering passenger service, marking a tipping point for green maritime technology.

articles.title: Edmonton weather: Severe thunderstorms could bring hail, heavy rain
articles.description: "These thunderstorms may be capable of producing strong wind gusts, large hail and heavy rain"

articles.title: Inovia promotes Mia Morisset to partner on growth team
articles.description: Montréal VC firm’s third growth fund has raised $365 million USD of $450-million target. The post Inovia promotes Mia Morisset to partner on growth team first appeared on BetaKit.

articles.title: Three jailed over heist of ancient golden helmet from Dutch museum
articles.description: The men are sentenced to 47 months each for stealing the 2,500-year-old Romanian Coțofenești helmet.

articles.title: What you need to know about the federal government’s grocery and essentials rebate
articles.description: The federal government’s new Canada Groceries and Essentials Benefit will see its first round of quarterly payments go out today. articles.title: Ukraine strikes cargo ships and admits Romania drone blast
articles.description: Ukraine says it struck five ships carrying illegal cargo in the Sea of Azov and in coastal waters of Russian-occupied territories.

articles.title: Astronauts briefly take shelter during repair to fix leak on the International Space Station
articles.description: NASA on Friday temporarily ordered astronauts to take shelter during repairs to fix a fresh leak aboard the International Space Station. articles.title: The DOGE Boys Get VC Funding to Support Their Latest Enterprise
articles.description: Former DOGE members and Elon Musk allies are backing a startup aimed at using AI to apply “learnings” from DOGE to the private sector.

articles.title: Putin rejects Zelensky’s offer to meet for negotiations, says he sees ‘no point’ in it
articles.description: President criticizes Western sanctions as damaging to the global economy at ‘Russian Davos’
